title: Get Creative Delivery Request
description: Request parameters for retrieving creative delivery data including variant-level metrics from a creative agent. At least one scoping filter (media_buy_ids or creative_ids) is required.

adcp_major_version.description: The AdCP major version the buyer's payloads conform to. Sellers validate against their supported major_versions and return VERSION_UNSUPPORTED if unsupported. When omitted, the seller assumes its highest supported version.

account.title: Account Reference
account.description: Account for routing and scoping. Limits results to creatives within this account.

account_id.description: Seller-assigned account identifier (from sync_accounts or list_accounts)

domain.description: Domain where /.well-known/brand.json is hosted, or the brand's operating domain

brand_id.title: Brand ID
brand_id.description: Brand identifier within the house portfolio. Optional for single-brand domains.

operator.description: Domain of the entity operating on the brand's behalf. When the brand operates directly, this is the brand's domain.

sandbox.description: When true, references the sandbox account for this brand/operator pair. Defaults to false (production account).

media_buy_ids.description: Filter to specific media buys by publisher ID. If omitted, returns creative delivery across all matching media buys.

creative_ids.description: Filter to specific creatives by ID. If omitted, returns delivery for all creatives matching the other filters.

start_date.description: Start date for delivery period (YYYY-MM-DD). Interpreted in the platform's reporting timezone.

end_date.description: End date for delivery period (YYYY-MM-DD). Interpreted in the platform's reporting timezone.

max_variants.description: Maximum number of variants to return per creative. When omitted, the agent returns all variants. Use this to limit response size for generative creatives that may produce large numbers of variants.

pagination.title: Pagination Request
pagination.description: Pagination parameters for the creatives array in the response. Uses cursor-based pagination consistent with other list operations.

max_results.description: Maximum number of items to return per page

cursor.description: Opaque cursor from a previous response to fetch the next page

context.title: Context Object
context.description: Opaque correlation data that is echoed unchanged in responses. Used for internal tracking, UI session IDs, trace IDs, and other caller-specific identifiers that don't affect protocol behavior. Context data is never parsed by AdCP agents - it's simply preserved and returned.

ext.title: Extension Object
ext.description: Extension object for platform-specific, vendor-namespaced parameters. Extensions are always optional and must be namespaced under a vendor/platform key (e.g., ext.gam, ext.roku). Used for custom capabilities, partner-specific configuration, and features being proposed for standardization.

_bundled.note: This is a bundled schema with all $ref resolved inline. For the modular version with references, use the parent directory.
